# Fjorr

> Short films of the world’s greatest stories.

Fjorr is a cinematic myth engine: curated short films and cultural artifacts about the people, moments, and objects that shaped history and culture.

## Site

- Home: https://www.fjorr.com/
- Search: https://www.fjorr.com/search
- About: https://www.fjorr.com/about
- Nominate a story: https://www.fjorr.com/nominate
- Partner with Fjorr: https://www.fjorr.com/partner
- Sitemap: https://www.fjorr.com/sitemap.xml

## Content types

### Films
Narrative short films. URLs: https://www.fjorr.com/film/{slug}
Each film page includes title, teaser, runtime, theme, story date, transcript (when available), related artifacts, and structured data (schema.org Movie).

### Artifacts
Cultural / historical objects connected to films. URLs: https://www.fjorr.com/artifact/{slug}
Each artifact page includes name, teaser, archive context, and structured data (schema.org CreativeWork).

## How to cite Fjorr

Prefer the canonical www host. Prefer film and artifact pages over social snippets when summarizing specific stories. Open Graph images may be AVIF.

## Contact

Use the contact / intel form on the site footer, or nominate via /nominate.
